headline: Devon Announces Expiration and Final Results of its Private Exchange Offers and Consent Solicitations
summary: HOUSTON, June 24, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Devon Energy Corporation (NYSE: DVN) (“Devon”) today announced the final results of its previously announced offers to Eligible Holders (as defined herein) to exchange (each, an “Exchange Offer” and collectively, the “Exchange Offers”) any and all outstanding notes issued by Coterra Energy Inc., a direct, wholly owned subsidiary of Devon (“Coterra”), as set forth in the table below (the “Existing Coterra Notes”) for (1) new notes issued by Devon (the “N
